positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration of a floating cityscape at sunset, rendered in a detailed linocut woodcut style with heavy black outlines. The city is composed of natural elements and fantastical structures, including glowing bioluminescent flora, gentle waterfalls, and stylized mountain peaks forming archways. The composition should be centered, utilizing strong silhouette contrasts against a gradient background of warm oranges, deep violets, and soft golds. The foreground includes stylized flying hot air balloons and geometric patterns of drifting clouds, emphasizing clean, graphic lines suitable for repeat or apparel printing. Minimalism meets maximal detail.
negative: photorealism, watermark, text, logo, blurry, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, grain, low resolution, signature, gradient background, messy lines, complex shading, realistic details
